required_validation_commands: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/mainnet-readonly-smoke.ps1 -RepoRoot D:\money\matchpulse_mainnet_test -FixtureId 18241006 -ExpectedTeam1 England -ExpectedTeam2 Argentina
expected_results: PowerShell 5.1 parses the script and ValidateOnly checks local env and configuration without a network request
the live validation performs GET-only fixture snapshot, score snapshot, and score updates requests against TxLINE mainnet Level 12
fixture 18241006 is resolved by ID or by the case-insensitive England and Argentina fallback
only safe fixture and score summaries are printed
no raw payload, credential, request header, or HTTP client configuration is printed
no odds or market endpoint is requested
no POST, database mutation, wallet operation, subscription, activation, token acquisition, migration, deployment, or other production operation occurs
Prisma and migration diff is empty
PHASE_QUEUE.json remains unchanged during phase execution

git_publish.commit_message: Complete local mainnet read-only smoke phase
